name: yuval-claude-marketplace
description: Yuval Personal marketplace of plugins, skills, and commands for working with Claude across Cowork and Claude Code.

plugins.name: yuval-core
plugins.description: v0.11.0 — Yuval Core workspace plugin: ideation scaffolding (init, refresh-persona), code-workspace extension (init-code, write-brief, promote-to-code, report-back), SPIRIT contract (D-028), Wiki 2.0 workshop layer (D-029), wiki-aware skills (D-030) — write-brief reads /wiki/goals.md + /wiki/backlog.md and stashes promotion-time markers in the brief; refresh-spirit reads /wiki/spirit-signals.md, folds pending signals into pre-fills, marks them synthesized after SPIRIT.md write; promote-to-code parses brief markers to close matched backlog items and archive consumed ideation files. Skill-wiki contract: read freely / write narrowly / never auto-modify canonical artifacts. Karpathy-style wiki discipline with live session pages, session continuity, persona management (v2 — mode-switcher + visual-first), framework-canonical memory protocol shared by ideation and code wikis.
